metadata.official_name: Louisiana State University and Agricultural & Mechanical College

strategic_profile.executive_summary: Louisiana State University and Agricultural & Mechanical College (LSU) is the flagship public research university of Louisiana, boasting a distinguished R1 'Very high research activity' classification. It is one of the elite group of institutions holding land-grant, sea-grant, and space-grant statuses, providing extensive research opportunities for its students.

analyst_takeaways.insight: LSU maintains a moderately selective overall acceptance rate of approximately 73%, but heavily utilizes a holistic review process that evaluates the whole student.
analyst_takeaways.implication: Students with solid, but not necessarily perfect, academic metrics have a strong chance of admission, especially if they demonstrate robust extracurricular leadership and community service.

analyst_takeaways.insight: The university holds the rare triple designation as a land, sea, and space-grant institution.
analyst_takeaways.implication: Undergraduates have unparalleled access to unique, well-funded research facilities like the PERTT lab for engineering and extensive coastal/environmental science centers.

analyst_takeaways.insight: LSU features an exceptionally spirited campus culture dominated by SEC athletics, strong Greek life, and over 450 student organizations.
analyst_takeaways.implication: Applicants should be prepared for a massive, highly social campus environment where community engagement and school spirit are central to the student experience.

campus_dynamics.social_environment: A highly active, spirited, and diverse campus characterized by a strong unifying passion for LSU athletics ('Death Valley'), vibrant Greek Life, and extensive intramural and club involvement.
campus_dynamics.transportation_impact: Parking is frequently cited as a major challenge by the student body, making the use of commuter plans, campus transit, and early arrivals critical for navigating the large campus.
campus_dynamics.research_impact: LSU's broad research mandate offers undergraduates practical experience in cutting-edge areas ranging from advanced gravitational-wave detection (LIGO) to biomedical research.

current_status.test_policy_details: LSU is test-optional for admissions; however, test scores are considered if submitted and may be required for specific merit-based scholarships such as the Louisiana TOPS program.

longitudinal_trends.notes: Waitlist data not publicly disclosed for recent cycles.

gpa.notes: LSU admits generally show a strong high school academic record; the average admitted GPA ranges around 3.76 - 3.82.

testing.policy_note: SAT submission rate was 7%, ACT submission rate was 40%.

colleges.name: E.J. Ourso College of Business
colleges.strategic_fit_advice: Ideal for students seeking a strong foundation in business knowledge with opportunities for practical experience via a simulated trading floor and a broad alumni network.
colleges.student_archetype: Driven aspiring corporate professionals and innovators.

majors.name: Accounting
majors.special_requirements: Requires a minimum 2.3 business GPA and a minimum 2.3 LSU business GPA to declare.
majors.notes: Accredited continuously by the AACSB since 1931.

colleges.name: Manship School of Mass Communication
colleges.strategic_fit_advice: Best for creative thinkers aiming for careers in media, journalism, public relations, or political communication with a desire for hands-on storytelling.

majors.name: Journalism
majors.special_requirements: Must have completed at least 30 hours of college-level coursework, including MC 2010 (Media Writing) with a 'B' or better.
majors.notes: Students are required to complete a minor outside of mass communication.

majors.name: Political Communication
majors.special_requirements: Completion of at least 30 hours of college-level course work and 'B' or better in MC 2010.
majors.notes: Graduates possess skills highly sought after in political campaigns, government agencies, and public relations.

colleges.name: School of Kinesiology
colleges.strategic_fit_advice: Designed for students pursuing healthcare professions including Physical Therapy, Occupational Therapy, and Medicine.
colleges.student_archetype: Future healthcare professionals, therapists, and sports medicine clinicians.

majors.name: Human Movement Science
majors.special_requirements: Requires a 2.5 GPA and completion with a C or better in English 1001, Math 1021, Math 1022, Biology 1201, and 1202.
majors.notes: Includes a highly coveted cadaver lab experience which requires an A or B in KIN 2500.

application_deadlines.notes: Priority deadline to be fully considered for institutional merit scholarships and honors college.

supplemental_requirements.details: Part of the holistic review process to assess a candidate's character, community service, and personal accomplishments.

holistic_factors.specific_differentiators: LSU's holistic process heavily weighs evidence of leadership, community engagement, and the capacity to overcome systemic barriers.

major_selection_tactics: Students targeting highly competitive pre-professional programs (e.g., Manship School of Mass Communication, Kinesiology) must focus on securing a high college GPA in prerequisite core courses.
Consider applying to a less impacted or generalized major for initial admission, with the plan of meeting the 2.5 - 2.6 GPA floor requirement to transfer internally later.
application_strategy.alternate_major_strategy: LSU allows for the selection of an alternate major. Students rejected from a highly selective first-choice program may be admitted into an alternate path, offering a backdoor to transfer internally once prerequisites are met.

scholarships.name: Stamps Scholarship
scholarships.benefits: Covers four years of full COA plus up to $14,000 for enrichment experiences and a one-time laptop stipend.
scholarships.application_method: Automatic via Ogden Honors College application

scholarships.name: President's Alumni Scholars Award
scholarships.benefits: Covers four years of full COA plus a $2,000 study abroad stipend.
scholarships.application_method: Automatic via Ogden Honors College application

scholarships.name: Louisiana Tiger Legacy Scholarship
scholarships.benefits: Stat-automatic tier-based scholarship depending on ACT score (24+).

scholarships.name: Taylor Opportunity Program for Students (TOPS)
scholarships.benefits: Louisiana's signature state-funded merit program covering tuition for eligible in-state residents.

scholarships.name: Louisiana GO Grant
scholarships.benefits: Need-based grant for Louisiana residents aimed at non-traditional and traditional learners.

ap_policy.general_rule: LSU grants advanced placement and course credit to freshmen who earn a score of 3, 4, or 5 on appropriate AP subject examinations.
ap_policy.usage: Can be used to bypass prerequisites and satisfy lower-level general education requirements.

ib_policy.general_rule: LSU accepts IB credit upon official transcript evaluation.

transfer_articulation.restrictions: Transfer students must have 30 college-level hours with a 2.5 cumulative GPA, plus a grade of 'C' or better in college-level English and Math.

what_it_takes: A rigorous high school transcript prioritizing academic core subjects.
Holistic indicators of leadership and community involvement.
An authentic essay highlighting cultural ties or academic passions.
essay_tips: Demonstrate resilience and the ability to overcome challenges.
Showcase extensive leadership experiences within your community.
Connect your personal narrative to Louisiana's distinct culture or the university's academic strengths.
red_flags: A lack of challenging core coursework during high school.
Disciplinary records or plummeting grades in the senior year.
insights: The massive campus size can feel isolating at first; students highly recommend joining 1-2 student groups immediately to find a niche.
While SEC football and partying are massive aspects of LSU culture, the 'weekend warrior' approach is strongly advised by peers to avoid failing academically.
Parking on campus is notoriously limited; many students recommend utilizing commuter transit systems or arriving very early.
